name: AI Search
description: Adds an AI search bar to the Jellyfin web client. Ask in natural language and get movies from your own library, personalized to your watch history, backed by a self-hosted AI platform or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
overview: AI natural-language search & recommendations from your own library.

versions.changelog: Direct mode now builds a local semantic index (embeddings + in-memory nearest-neighbour search) over any OpenAI-compatible endpoint, so results match by meaning instead of sending a catalog slice. Nightly refresh via a scheduled task. Built against Jellyfin 10.11.0 for 10.11.x compatibility.
